name: Nordby Kro
description: Classic Danish inn. Breakfast buffet with local produce, on-site restaurant and bar. Best hiking access — Ballebjerg 25-min walk.

name: Rum og Rooms
description: Food-forward farmhouse guesthouse. Communal dinners, local organic menu, homemade breakfasts. Email to confirm May availability.

name: Vesborg Fyr
description: 1858 lighthouse apartments. Sea views over Samsø Strait toward Funen, Zealand and Jutland. 50m to water. Most dramatic setting.

name: Yduns Have
description: Rustic wooden cabin on working organic farm. 100+ varieties of vegetables. Farm shop on site. Shared kitchen. Genuinely primitive.

name: Sælvigbugtens
description: 19m² Lotus Belle tent on wooden platform. Box-spring beds, gas grill, fridge, private terrace. Walking distance from ferry. Wake up to the Kattegat.
